hero_subtitle: Premium photography services for your special occasions.
about_text_1: At Lumina Studio, we believe every moment holds a unique story waiting to be told. Our passion is to freeze time and capture the raw emotions, the beautiful chaos, and the delicate details that make your moments unforgettable.
about_text_2: We blend cinematic artistry with premium execution to bring out the luxurious feel of every event.
services_subtitle: Tailored photography experiences designed to perfection.
service_1_desc: Cinematic coverage of your special day, capturing every emotion and detail.
service_2_desc: Romantic storytelling through breathtaking outdoor and studio sessions.
service_3_desc: Professional documentation of corporate and luxury private events.
service_4_desc: Soft, warm, and highly creative portraits of your little ones and pregnancy.
portfolio_subtitle: A glimpse into our visual aesthetics.
testimonial_1_text: "Lumina captured our wedding beautifully. The attention to detail and golden hour shots were absolutely breathtaking. Highly recommended for a premium experience!"
testimonial_2_text: "Our corporate event was covered with utmost professionalism. They delivered the photos quickly and the quality was stunning."
testimonial_3_text: "The maternity shoot was so comfortable and the photos look like they belong in a magazine. Thank you Lumina!"
